title: daphne odora f. alba
intro: Daphne odora f. alba, also known as the White Daphne or White Fragrant Daphne, is a fragrant evergreen shrub native to China and Japan. It is a cultivar of Daphne odora, a species of flowering plant known for its sweet, fragrant flowers and glossy, dark green leaves. The medicinal properties of Daphne odora f. alba include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that are believed to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall health.
